Octaryn

Reference for Octaryn modules, contracts, and build tooling.

Pages

Home API Examples Architecture Build Tooling Texture Packs GitHub

Octaryn Build Tooling

Preset-first, owner-partitioned builds.

Octaryn build tooling keeps generated output organized by preset and owner. Root scripts wrap CMake and validation commands without hiding the actual target names.

Presets

Preset Purpose
debug-linux Primary Linux development preset.
release-linux Optimized Linux build preset.
debug-windows Linux-hosted Windows debug cross-build preset.
release-windows Linux-hosted Windows release cross-build preset.

Commands

cmake --preset debug-linux
tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux

tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_client_bundle
tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_server
tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_basegame
tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_shared

Launch Probes

Owner launch probes validate that the public owner entry points can start and write the expected logs.

tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_run_client_launch_probe
tools/build/cmake_build.sh debug-linux --target octaryn_run_server_launch_probe

Validation Probes

Managed validation probes check module manifests, scheduling contracts, owner boundaries, and host bridge surfaces.

dotnet run --project tools/validation/Octaryn.ModuleManifestProbe/Octaryn.ModuleManifestProbe.csproj --configuration Debug -- octaryn-basegame
dotnet run --project tools/validation/Octaryn.SchedulerProbe/Octaryn.SchedulerProbe.csproj --configuration Debug
dotnet run --project tools/validation/Octaryn.OwnerModuleValidationProbe/Octaryn.OwnerModuleValidationProbe.csproj --configuration Debug

Texture Atlases

Basegame texture-pack imports are content tooling. Generated atlas files should land under the basegame owner output path.

python3 octaryn-basegame/Tools/build_atlas_from_pack.py \
  --pack /path/to/resource-pack.zip \
  --sha256 PACK_SHA256 \
  --pack-name "PACK_NAME" \
  --pack-source-url PACK_SOURCE_URL \
  --pack-license-name "PACK_LICENSE" \
  --pack-license-url PACK_LICENSE_URL \
  --pack-license-file "path/to/included/license.txt" \
  --pack-credit "PACK_AUTHOR_OR_TEAM" \
  --pack-credits-url PACK_CREDITS_URL \
  --cache-dir build/dependencies/texture-packs \
  --output build/debug-linux/basegame/assets/atlases/basegame-color.png \
  --normal-output build/debug-linux/basegame/assets/atlases/basegame-normal.png \
  --specular-output build/debug-linux/basegame/assets/atlases/basegame-specular.png \
  --animation-output build/debug-linux/basegame/assets/atlases/basegame-animation.png \
  --animation-manifest build/debug-linux/basegame/assets/atlases/basegame-animation.txt \
  --tile-size 32 \
  --layer-count 29

Output Layout

build/<preset>/cmake/
build/<preset>/client/
build/<preset>/server/
build/<preset>/shared/
build/<preset>/basegame/
build/<preset>/tools/
logs/client/
logs/server/
logs/shared/
logs/basegame/
logs/build/
logs/tools/

Tooling Owners

Folder Responsibility
tools/build/ Configure, build, Podman, package, and environment wrappers.
tools/validation/ Focused validators for manifests, CMake policy, launch logs, scheduler contracts, and owner surfaces.
tools/profiling/ Profiling capture helpers and performance tooling entry points.
cmake/ Shared build policy, owner targets, dependency aliases, platform facts, and toolchains.
